description: Damage one enemy with small flames.

<Custom Learn JP Cost>
  cost = parseInt(40 / (user.mat - user.atk > 0 ? Math.abs(user.mat - user.atk) : 1));

description:
A mighty double slash.
Used by: daggers, all swords, all axes and maces.
name: Double Slash
note:
<Learn Require Switch: 299>
<Custom Requirement>
   if (user.isWtypeEquipped(1)
       || user.isWtypeEquipped(2)
       || user.isWtypeEquipped(3)
       || user.isWtypeEquipped(4)
       || user.isWtypeEquipped(5)
       || user.isWtypeEquipped(8)) {
     value = true;
   } else {
     value = false;
   }
</Custom Requirement>
<Custom Learn JP Cost>
  cost = parseInt(40 / (user.atk - user.mat > 0 ? Math.abs(user.atk - user.mat) : 1));
</Custom Learn JP Cost>

</Custom Learn JP Cost>

description: Gain strength and stamina at the cost of your mobility.
name: Bulk Up

description: Howl a war cry to raise the morale of your party.
name: War Cry

description: Increases the targets ability to hit vital spots.
name: Focus

description: Gather your courage and strike your enemies harder.
name: Bravery

description: Speeds up all of your abilities.
name: Haste

description: Make a protective barrier against spells.
name: Shell

description:
The wielder protects a friendly target by increasing their
physical and magical defenses
name: Protect

description: Curse your foe, making them easier to fight.
name: Curse

description: Makes the target unable to avoid and healing isn't as effective.
name: Disease

description: Burden an enemy to lower their damage.
name: Weaken

description:
Instil fear into your enemy, lowering their ability to move and
defend themselves.
name: Cower

description:
Remove an enemies protection from spells and lower their magical
defense.
name: Deshell

description: Demoralize your enemies, lowering all their fighting abilities.
name: Demoralize
